name: Customer Resolution Workflow
description: Fully resolve a customer complaint involving a duplicate charge, including classification, prioritization, drafting a response, escalation, and scheduling a follow-up.
goal: Completely resolve the customer complaint by classifying, responding empathetically, escalating to the right team, and scheduling a follow-up.
instruction: You are an AI operations assistant. A customer has emailed about being charged twice and not receiving a response for days. You must: open the email, classify it as billing, set priority to high, draft an empathetic reply acknowledging the issue and promising resolution, send the reply, escalate to the billing team, schedule a follow-up, then finish. Complete the full resolution workflow.

emails.subject: URGENT: Charged twice — no response for 3 days!
emails.body:
To whom it may concern,

I am extremely frustrated. I was charged TWICE for my order #ORD-9981 on March 22, and despite emailing your support team THREE DAYS AGO, I have received absolutely no response.

The charges are:
- $149.99 on March 22
- $149.99 on March 23 (duplicate)

This is unacceptable. I need the duplicate charge reversed immediately, and I expect a prompt reply this time. If this is not resolved within 24 hours, I will be filing a dispute with my credit card company and leaving reviews about my experience.

Sarah Chen
Account: SC-77201
Phone: 555-0142
